summary: Data and type cleanup for menu sound test and data-delete code. The PR split large address-style data objects into smaller typed symbols, moved recovered mndatadel data into static declarations, adjusted code to use the split arrays/AnimLoopSettings/Vec3 values, simplified one repeated mndatadel sequence into a for-loop, and corrected mnSoundTest_8024BEE0's return type in source and header. Bot output reports three new matches and several score improvements, including 100% data for main/melee/mn/mndatadel and main/melee/mn/mnsoundtest.

key_files.role: Split and retagged data symbols for mnsoundtest and mndatadel; added local labels and adjusted some sdata2 scope/name metadata.
Updated uses from monolithic struct offsets to split static data symbols and arrays; simplified six-item animation setup to a for-loop; adjusted user-data flag accesses to x3[index].
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mndatadel.c hunks in mnDataDel_8024EA6C, mnDataDel_8024EBC8, fn_8024ECCC, fn_8024F318, fn_8024F840, fn_8024FBA4

key_files.role: Shrank MnDataDelData to the two AnimLoopSettings still owned by the struct, changed per-slot user flags from separate fields to x3[6], and declared recovered static data arrays/Vec3/AnimLoopSettings.
Added vec_8, changed data_4 to signed entries, corrected vector/table use sites, changed L-trigger check to StartButton, and returned HSD_GObjProc* directly from mnSoundTest_8024BEE0.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnsoundtest.c hunks around vec_8, data_4, fn_8024AED0, mnSoundTest_8024BCA0, mnSoundTest_8024BEE0

key_files.role: Updated mnSoundTest_8024BEE0 prototype from s32 to HSD_GObjProc*.

what_changed: Replaced broad symbols mnSoundTest_803EF0A8 and mnSoundTest_803EF114 with smaller typed data symbols including vec_0 through vec_8, text_ids, data_2, data_3, data_4, and several mnSoundTest string symbols.

Split mndatadel data around 0x803EF870 into typed AnimLoopSettings, u32/u16 arrays, Vec3, and string labels; code now references mnDataDel_803EF888, mnDataDel_803EF894, mnDataDel_803EF8A0, mnDataDel_803EF8AC, mnDataDel_803EF8C8, and lbl_803EF8D4 directly.
Changed MnDataDelGObjUserData's individual byte flags x3 through x8 into an indexed x3[6] array and updated flag writes accordingly.
Converted a six-iteration do/while with pointer stepping and byte-offset writes in mnDataDel_8024EA6C into a for-loop over i = 0..5 using mnDataDel_803EF8AC[i] and temp_r31->x3[i].
Corrected mnSoundTest_8024BEE0 to return HSD_GObjProc* in both implementation and header instead of casting the proc pointer to s32.
Bot report recorded +280 matched code bytes, +1808 matched data bytes, three new matches, and improvements in nine unmatched items.

smart_moves.text: Used data split metadata and source declarations together: symbols.txt was updated to smaller typed objects while code/header declarations were adjusted to consume those objects directly.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mndatadel.c references to mnDataDel_803EF8AC and mnDataDel_803EF8C8

smart_moves.text: Turned repeated per-menu-item flag fields into an array where code already indexes the same conceptual six slots.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mndatadel.c temp_r31->x3[i] and user_data->x3[n] updates

smart_moves.text: Kept the recovered pointer return type synchronized between implementation and public header.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a large generated-looking data struct is only serving as a container for adjacent independent tables, splitting it into typed objects can make source accesses clearer and can improve data matching.
evidence_refs: text_corpus bot report: mndatadel .data and mnsoundtest .data reached 100%

decomp_lessons.lesson: If adjacent user-data byte fields are repeatedly accessed by slot number, an array field can express the recovered layout better than separate x3/x4/x5 names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mndatadel.c writes to temp_r31->x3[i] and user_data->x3[0..4]

decomp_lessons.lesson: A small natural loop over a recovered index table can replace pointer-stepping and byte-offset temporaries when the repeated operations differ only by index.
When a function constructs and returns a proc pointer, update the function signature and header to the pointer type instead of preserving an integer cast.

naming_conventions.convention: This PR uses generic recovered data names such as vec_0..vec_8, data_2..data_4, text_ids, and address-style lbl_803EF8D4 when stronger semantic names are not evidenced.
Recovered type names are preserved for known structures and APIs, e.g. AnimLoopSettings, Vec3, HSD_GObjProc, and HSD_Text.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Split monolithic data symbols into multiple typed symbols with precise sizes/scopes in symbols.txt, then update C declarations and references to those symbols.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mndatadel.static.h and mnsoundtest.c static data declarations
text_corpus bot report: +1808 matched data bytes
risk_notes: Data-symbol and section metadata changes can affect unrelated units; this PR evidence includes bot match output but no human review discussion.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use indexed arrays for recovered tables and per-slot flags to avoid raw casts like ((s32*) &struct_field)[i] and byte-offset writes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mndatadel.c replacements of ((s32*) &mnDataDel_803EF870.x3C)[...] with mnDataDel_803EF8AC[...]
raw_diff: mndatadel.c replacements of user_data->x3/x5/x6/x7 with user_data->x3[index]

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Preserve narrow stack/codegen steering where still present: mnDataDel_8024EA6C includes u8 pad[0x8] and PAD_STACK(0x10).
risk_notes: The diff does not explain why the padding remains; treat as local matching tactic rather than style.

review_feedback.feedback: Reported GALE01 match improvements: matched code 66.56% (+0.01%, +280 bytes), matched data 39.00% (+0.15%, +1808 bytes), three new matches, and nine improved unmatched items.

follow_up_queries: symbols.txt split monolithic data object menu mn

notes: Changed files and concrete diffs are available, including full local diff inspection for mndatadel.static.h, mnsoundtest.c, and mnsoundtest.h.
PR body is empty and there are no human review comments in the supplied slice.
The bot report supports match-score impact, but the slice does not include build logs, objdiff commands, or author explanation for each data split.
Diff evidence shows data-symbol changes outside the immediate mnsoundtest/mndatadel region in bss/sdata2, but intent and blast-radius review are not documented.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Split recovered monolithic data containers only when code and symbol metadata can consume typed pieces
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2482 shows a data cleanup pattern where broad menu data symbols were split into typed AnimLoopSettings, Vec3, u32/u16 arrays, strings, and table symbols, with C references updated to use the split objects. Bot output reported new data matches for mndatadel and mnsoundtest.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mndatadel.c and mnsoundtest.c use-site updates

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use real pointer return types when recovered body proves a proc pointer
accepted_candidate_records.text: mnSoundTest_8024BEE0 was changed from returning s32 with a casted HSD_GObjProc* to returning HSD_GObjProc* directly, and the header prototype was updated in the same PR.

source_update_candidates.title: mndatadel/mnsoundtest menu data cleanup touched both C declarations and symbols.txt
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2482 is evidence that src/melee/mn/mndatadel.c, src/melee/mn/mndatadel.static.h, src/melee/mn/mnsoundtest.c, src/melee/mn/mnsoundtest.h, and config/GALE01/symbols.txt were jointly involved in menu data symbol/type cleanup.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-scoping fact for future mnsoundtest/mndatadel data cleanup searches; route to curator rather than accepting automatically.

source_update_candidates.title: Data cleanup PRs should document data-symbol split evidence and blast radius
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2482 includes broad symbols.txt data split work and bot match improvements, but no PR body or human review explanation. Consider whether standards should ask data-cleanup PRs to record the evidence for section ownership and adjacent symbol/scope changes.
evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR body null and review_comments 0
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a possible process improvement, not an accepted rule from this PR alone.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all vec_N/data_N names are preferred naming style; the PR only shows these names used where semantics remain limited.
Do not claim the author intentionally validated every adjacent sdata2/bss change; the slice only includes the bot report and diff.
Do not promote the remaining PAD_STACK/pad locals as accepted style; the diff gives no rationale beyond local matching context.
